recent_changes.description: Consolidated Git repository to root and pushed all project segments (Code + Docs) to GitHub.
Created comprehensive system documentation including USER_GUIDE.md (Model Mechanics) and LOGIC_DIAGRAM.md (Mermaid Flowchart).
Implemented Historical Backtesting Engine (backtest.py) and generated BACKTEST_REPORT.md showing +6.93% ROI over 500 candles.
Resolved 'Unclosed client session' errors by implementing a multi-stage async cleanup with a 0.5s grace period in lifespan.
Consolidated dual .brain directories into a single root source of truth and updated all documentation.
Added Portfolio PnL & ROI Tracking components with real-time updates and Close Position support.
Integrated Market Structure & Liquidity (MSL) Analyzer (BOS, CHoCH, FVG) into AI Brain logic.
Nâng cấp AI Brain v1.1: System Prompt MTFA chuyên sâu với Magnet, Whipsaw, Confluence.

errors_encountered.solution: Implemented multi-stage cleanup (Telegram -> Binance) with a 0.5s grace period in lifespan.

errors_encountered.solution: Safe average extraction for price strings
